_about: Single source of truth for global git config defaults. Consumed by both PS1 (Apply-DefaultGitConfig) and bash (apply_default_git_config). Each entry: { key, value, scope:'global', mode:'set-if-empty'|'set-always' }.

defaults._note: true on Windows, input on Unix -- consumers may override per OS
credential.helper=manager works on Win (GCM-Core); 'cache --timeout=86400' is the conservative Unix default
Conservative dev-machine default. 'set-if-missing-value' uses --add semantics so existing safe.directory entries are preserved.
